Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Aug-31-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Defendant Ronda J. Valasco's Claim Of Exemption is taken off Calendar as Moot. The sheriff states that it never collected any funds and the creditor never filed a timely opposition to the claim of exemption. Judge Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/RBU)
